problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile sequence has collected local operator shadow-pilot observations and now needs a schema-backed runtime-promotion approval evidence packet that closes only the approval-evidence gap without granting runtime promotion authority.
success_criteria: a deterministic validator emits the runtime-promotion approval packet from the current operator shadow-pilot observation receipt
the checked-in local approval packet matches the deterministic produced packet
the schema records runtime-promotion approval evidence as collected while denying runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success claims, and terminal closure
the packet records passed approval criteria for source observation validity, plan-class coverage, parity, projection match, zero mismatches, authority denials, and Foundation Mode no-effect boundary
the packet keeps runtime promotion blocked by replay/recovery witness and terminal closure certificate gates
focused tests cover schema compatibility, fixture parity, source receipt binding, approval criteria, missing promotion gate rejection, uncollected source rejection, and authority-drift rejection
non_goals: do not add a router, worker, scheduler, connector, or runtime registration path
do not claim replay, recovery, or terminal closure evidence
do not replace the prior observation receipt
constraints: the approval packet is local, read-only, deterministic, and reversible
runtime promotion remains AwaitingEvidence until replay/recovery and terminal closure evidence exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the validator does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: schema-backed local runtime-promotion approval packet fixture
deterministic validator and produced packet parity
SDLC design and security review artifacts
